---
title: "Mussel Methylation"
subtitle: "2024 - 2026"
description: "Exploring epigenetic signals as early indicators of stress and contaminant exposure"
---

### Project Overview & Purpose

Not yet ready for our close-up! Trying on a new way to maintain pertinent information for a project in a singular place instead of across a few platforms. Last updated 4.8.26.

### Quick Links

1.  [Project repo](https://github.com/ChrisMantegna/wdfw_mussel_methylation)

2.  [Process & working notes](https://chrismantegna.github.io/labnotebook/project_log/mussel_methylation/process.html)

3.  [Working Questions](https://chrismantegna.github.io/labnotebook/project_log/mussel_methylation/questions.html)

4.  Methods & Protocols

### Research Questions

### Anticipated Products & Findings

### Next Steps
